_meta.title: baa curriculum graph — competency + difficulty tier + prerequisites (PROVISIONAL DRAFT)
_meta.source: docs/curriculum/national-curriculum-grade1.md (grade-1 competencies + the منقول→منظور→غير منظور إملاء lattice + the §'What this means for Qalam' section-order chain). This node id set is the SOURCE for server/app/curriculum_data/baa_authored_ids.json (the 17 live baa.* graph node ids — the G4 membership rail derives FROM these nodes; 19 review WR-05).
_meta.regenerate: cd server && uv run python -m app.curriculum_data.generate
_meta.sign_off: Owner-mother signs at the TIER level (D-05): she confirms the baa-config→competency mapping, the 70/30 essential/enrichment split, and the per-skill clean-reps. signedOff stays false until then — Claude DRAFTED this; she REVIEWS and signs (mirror the AUTHORED_BAA_IDS gate). Plan 15-07 owns the flip to true.
_meta.microDrills: Plan 18-02 adds baa.microDrill.{dot,bowl,start} as ADDITIVE enrichment nodes (competency 'microDrill', essential:false, criterion-tagged dot/shape/strokeOrder). They never gate the star (D-06). Their CONTENT ships signedOff:false at the EXERCISE level (assets/curriculum/exercises.json); the file-level signedOff:true is the owner-mother's 15-07 tier-structure sign-off, unchanged. The drill copy is signed at the 18-11 HUMAN-UAT gate.
_meta.owner_amendment_2026_07_12: Owner-directed UAT amendment: (a) baa.traceLetter.final added to positionalForms so the child traces ALL FOUR forms before production tasks ('really saw the letter in all forms'); (b) microDrill nodes + competency were REMOVED from the graph (feature parked). Both pending owner-mother sign-off.
_meta.microDrill_restore_19_05: Plan 19-05 (D-18) RESTORES the 3 authored baa.microDrill.{dot,bowl,start} nodes + the 'microDrill' competency to the live graph, behind the reworked question presentation (19-02 instruction bar + 19-03 stimulus renderers) and the 18-10 SpotlightOverlay. They remain ADDITIVE enrichment (essential:false → never gate the star, D-06); the drill CONTENT stays signedOff:false at the exercise level (its sign-off is the mother's review-packet gate). The file-level signedOff:true (15-07 tier-structure) is unchanged. microdrill_selection_test's fixture no longer needs to inject them — the live graph now supplies them.
_meta.gated_cards_19_05: Plan 19-05 (D-12/D-19) GATES the 6 baa cards that fundamentally need unlearned letters — baa.buildSentence.{hear,picture}, baa.fillBlank.adjective, baa.transformWord.{dual,plural,opposite} — by REMOVING their nodes from this graph so they are unreachable in the baa unit's cleared set (learned-letters lint QP-07). Their exercise CONFIGS stay dormant in exercises.json (signedOff:true, mother-signed at 15-07) and are filed for the target letter's own unit in Phase 20/21; no cross-unit-prerequisite schema field is added (A6). baa.connectWord.kitaab is REWRITTEN to an alif+baa word (signedOff:false) rather than gated — the mother confirms rewrite-vs-gate in 19-REVIEW-PACKET.md.
_meta.owner_removal_2026_07_18: Owner device-UAT decision 2026-07-18: micro-drills REMOVED from the live graph again (the 19-05/D-18 restore is reversed - drills interrupted the unit flow on device). The 3 authored baa.microDrill.* configs stay dormant in exercises.json; re-add nodes + the 'microDrill' competency to restore. Supersedes microDrill_restore_19_05.
_meta.owner_restore_2026_07_18: Owner device-UAT decision 2026-07-18: the 6 gated cards (buildSentence.hear/picture, fillBlank.adjective, transformWord.dual/plural/opposite) are RESTORED to the live graph - the owner found them 'perfect and really impressive' on device; they stay despite demanding unlearned letters (owner-approved lint exception; the presentation carries them). Supersedes gated_cards_19_05. kitaab card word is now بابا (dad) per the owner's packet-alternative pick.
_meta.owner_dormant_2026_07_20: Owner decision 2026-07-20 (quick task 260720-up4): the 4 reach-ahead GRAMMAR cards — baa.fillBlank.adjective + baa.transformWord.{dual,plural,opposite} — are made DORMANT (their NODES REMOVED here; baa goes 18→14 nodes) so the never-passable enrichment tail can no longer block the star forever ('baa never advances'). This REVERSES the owner_restore_2026_07_18 clause for these 4 ids AND the mother's F1 verdict, PENDING her re-confirmation packet. The now-empty wordBuilding + grammarTransform competencies are RETAINED (node-less, parser-tolerated). Their exercise CONFIGS stay in exercises.json (fully reversible, mirroring buildSentence). Supersedes owner_restore_2026_07_18 for these 4 grammar ids.
